2026-03-21.patch_summary: This patch refactors the kmem probe and remove functions by extracting initialization, cleanup, hotplug, and hot-remove logic into separate helper functions. The new helpers enable future extensions to support more granular control over memory hotplug operations. Specifically, it introduces four new functions: dax_kmem_init_resources, dax_kmem_cleanup_resources, dax_kmem_do_hotplug, and dax_kmem_do_hotremove. These functions handle tasks such as initializing resources, cleaning up initialized resources, handling memory region reservation and addition, and handling memory removal and resource cleanup. The patch is a pure refactoring with no functional change, making it easier to extend the code in the future.
